health_conditions: keloid scar on face from old pimple (20 years old)

benefits.description: Keloid scar on face reduced in size by over half in less than 4 weeks after starting GHK-Cu. Visible reduction: previously could fit bump under fingernail, now cannot. Scar barely noticeable in comparison photos taken Dec 15 and current date (within ~2-4 weeks).

protocol_notes: Started Tirzepatide in October 2025 (dosage unknown). Started GHK-Cu 2.5mg daily in December 2025. Keloid reduction not noticed until after GHK-Cu initiation. Attributes improvement to GHK-Cu based on timing. Documented with before/after photos at consistent lighting and angle (Dec 15 baseline). User notes scientific literature exists on GHK-Cu and keloid scar reduction.
